about.title: My Design Philosophy
about.philosophy: "Design is not just what we see, but how it works and the feeling it brings to people."
about.description: I believe that true beauty lies in simplicity and elegance. Every project I undertake starts with understanding user pain points to create solutions that are not only beautiful but also thoroughly solve problems.

hero.name: Nguyen Van A
hero.description: I focus on creating simple, refined, and inspiring digital experiences.

bio.title: My Story
bio.p1: My creative journey began with a curiosity about how people interact with technology. I believe that good design is not just about aesthetics, but about empathy and solving real problems intelligently.
bio.p2: With over 8 years of experience in UI/UX and branding, I have had the opportunity to collaborate with many startups and large corporations to build impactful products. My style leans towards minimalism, where every line and whitespace has its own purpose.

items.desc: Leading the design team to build Design Systems for next-generation digital banking applications.
Designing user experiences for an e-commerce platform with over 1 million monthly users.
Developing brand identities and media publications for F&B brands.

values.title: Core Values
values.subtitle: Principles that shape my work style.

items.title: Minimalism is Power
items.desc: Eliminating redundant elements to focus on core values. Simplicity brings clarity and efficiency.

items.title: Human-Centered Design

items.title: Non-stop Learning

projects.title: My Projects
projects.description: Explore the creative products and solutions I have built throughout my career.

danang.problemTitle: Difficulty finding travel services in Da Nang.
danang.problemDesc: Travelers often need to visit multiple platforms to book hotels, find restaurants, and discover attractions. This fragmented experience makes trip planning complex and time-consuming.
danang.solutionTitle: Consolidate all travel services into a single platform.
danang.solutionDesc: DaNang Explorer integrates hotel booking, restaurant recommendations, experience tours, and a smart map into one intuitive app, helping travelers plan and enjoy a perfect trip with just a few taps.

eduflow.problemTitle: Learners lack personalized roadmaps and effective memorization tools.
eduflow.problemDesc: Most learning apps today provide the same content for all users. This causes learners to get discouraged with overly difficult content or waste time on material they already know.
eduflow.solutionTitle: Adaptive learning paths and AI flashcards with spaced repetition.
eduflow.solutionDesc: EduFlow analyzes learning progress and automatically adjusts exercise difficulty. The AI flashcard system reviews at the right time to reinforce long-term memory, combined with a gamification interface that boosts daily motivation.

sellio.problemTitle: Online sales management lacks a centralized and transparent system.
sellio.problemDesc: Online shops are using multiple scattered tools to manage orders, inventory, and payments. This causes data loss, order errors, and wastes time on manual processing.
sellio.solutionTitle: Comprehensive sales management platform from A to Z in one interface.
sellio.solutionDesc: Sellio unifies product management, cart, multi-gateway payment, and real-time order tracking. An intuitive dashboard with revenue charts helps shop owners make fast and accurate decisions.

hero.title: Skills & Process
hero.description: The combination of aesthetic thinking and scientific workflow to create optimal digital products.

process.title: Design Process
process.subtitle: How I bring ideas from sketches to finished products.

steps.title: 1. Research
steps.desc: Analyze requirements, survey users, and understand competitors.

steps.title: 2. Wireframe
steps.desc: Build information architecture and sketch basic user flows.

steps.title: 3. Prototype
steps.desc: Design detailed interfaces and create realistic interactive prototypes.

steps.title: 4. Test
steps.desc: Evaluate usability and optimize based on feedback.
